Tell us about the deployment you're planning. This helps us improve the
fork-and-edit experience and lets us link communities together.

## Community

- Region / city:
- Who's behind it (organization, club, individuals):
- Planned URL (if known):

## Data you have

- [ ] Curated road / greenway routes
- [ ] Mountain bike trail tileset
- [ ] Bike shops / resources
- [ ] Attractions / points of interest
- [ ] A GBFS bike-share feed

## Where you're stuck

Anything in the fork process that's unclear or blocking — config, Mapbox
Studio, the trail elevation pipeline, deployment, etc.

## Anything else

Notes, questions, or feedback on the deployment docs.
